news.headline: Iraq’s president ask PM-designate Ali al-Zaidi to form government
news.summary: Iraq’s president on Monday tasked businessman Ali al-Zaidi with forming a government after he was nominated prime minister by the country’s dominant parliamentary bloc. Zaidi is a political newcomer and has never before held a government post.

news.headline: King Charles and Queen Camilla arrive for high-profile US state visit

news.headline: Man pleads guilty in the 2002 killing of Run-DMC’s Jam Master Jay
